title: Tales from Wood Creek: Глава 1
subtitle: D&D с Deborah Ann Woll, Iman Vellani и Dungeon Dudes
source_name: Tales From Woodcreek： Chapter 1 (D&D w⧸ Deborah Ann Woll & Iman Vellani) [hmY-MyQhWCk].mp4
note: Смысловая разметка + тезисы (LLM по транскрипту). Первая глава кампании в проклятом Wood Creek.
overview_theses: Эпизод совмещает рекламу Dungeons of Drakkenheim (Daggerheart) и первую главу кампании в проклятом Wood Creek.
Потомки четырёх семей несут метку ведьмы; Becky Laskay зовёт героев снять проклятие через заклинательную книгу.
Паладин Victor и бард Valentine (Dungeon Dudes) встречают Becky, гигантессу Una и шпионку Vix у школьного дома.
Школа — ключевая локация: компас указывает на книгу, но призрак учительницы Miss Vickers и дух Tommy мешают поиску.
Расследование через урок, записки Tommy и «доску духов» выводит к Reverend Dixon и тайнику за партой.
Финал — бой с призраком учительницы, divine smite Виктора и сейф с буквенными дисками — клиффхэнгер на главу 2.

chapters.title: Легенда Wood Creek
chapters.summary: Повествование о Heartstone, проклятии ведьмы и потомках основателей, которым Becky обещает шанс снять проклятие.
theses: Жители нашли Heartstone в шахтах; ведьма прокляла детей основателей и превратила взрослых в монстров.
Потомки несут метку ведьмы — без любви, удачи и процветания, но иммунны к порче внутри города.
Becky Laskay пишет, что знает способ сломать проклятие и вернуть Wood Creek.

segments.text: I invite you to join us on an adventure.
It takes place in a town called Wood Creek.
The tales of its fall from grace have spread far and wide.
As the story goes, it all began when the good people of Wood Creek found a glowing red gem buried deep within the mines on the outskirts of town.
This powerful relic offered them true riches and access to magic beyond their wildest imaginings.
They called it the Heartstone, and the four founding families vowed to share it equally.
The town prospered, but not for long.
An evil witch heard of this discovery and demanded that the founders hand over the Heartstone to her.
When they refused, she cursed their children, giving them nightmarish visions of the destruction of Wood Creek
and branding their palms with her fiendish mark.
In a final confrontation, she unleashed a wave of corrupt energy,
transforming every living resident of Wood Creek into a monster
and desecrating the land so that nothing could live there without succumbing to her corruption.
In a strange twist of fate, the magic she inflicted upon the children rendered them immune to the corrupting forces of Wood Creek.
However, the curse persisted, and even as the children of Wood Creek grew old and left town,
they passed the curse down through generations,
dooming each descendant to a life without love, luck, or prosperity.
Soon we will meet some of these unfortunate souls.
They bear the witch's mark, and nothing in life seems to go their way.
A message from Becky Laskay, a descendant of Wood Creek herself,
suggests she has information that can help them break the curse,
restore the town riches, and perhaps save Wood Creek once and for all.
These are the tales from Wood Creek.
